name: msg
description: /msg — session-to-session messaging over a UNIX domain socket, NO MCP (sidecar @D s15). Two Claude Code TUI sessions exchange one-line JSON messages: the SEND side is a CLI one-liner (`socat - UNIX-CONNECT:<peer>.sock`, fallback `nc -U <path>`); the RECEIVE side is the agent arming a persistent Monitor on `socat UNIX-LISTEN:<self>.sock,fork -` so each received line surfaces as a chat task-notification. Local mailbox + roster under `~/.sidecar/msg/` (roster.json maps nick → socket path + sid + ts) so pool-route keeps it LOCAL. Verbs — `send <nick> <text...>` (direct, one-line JSON `{from,text,ts}`) · `broadcast <text...>` (= `send all <text>`, every roster peer except self) · `listen` (upsert self into roster + print the exact Monitor command for the agent to run) · `who` (roster table, each socket marked alive via `test -S`, dead rows flagged not deleted) · `nick <name>` (store self nick in `~/.sidecar/msg/self`) · bare `/msg` (status: my nick · am I listening · roster peer count). NL triggers via the skill — '세션끼리 통신' · '옆 세션에 보내' · 'send to session' · 'socket message' · 'inter-session'.
